3073530.name: Constructo - Dungeons Builder (GM Version)
3073530.description:
DLC: Constructo - Dungeons Builder (GM Version)

This is the DLC of "Constructo - Dungeons Builder"* that will allow you to generate the code needed to get your friends to join the game!

Please note:
This is the only way to be able to activate the multiplayer mode of "Constructo - Dungeons Builder" and it is also the only way to support us.

*"Constructo - Dungeons Builder" is a tool that turns your imagination into reality. A virtual tabletop that packs a set of tools for your favorite tabletop RPG! Say goodbye to those unappealing last-second sketches and instead see maps with your own eyes in an incredible pulsating 3D full of life. FREE for players!
3073530.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
